description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The stylish dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance - perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Case diameter: 37 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty:  2 Years  Metal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortRubber straps with a tang claspBlack dial with cat logo at the 12 hour markThree time displaysBranding on the bezelScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 metres
